title: Simple Bushes
description: This mod adds simple vanilla-friendly bushes to the game, with sapling and leaves.
body:
This mod adds **simple bushes** to the game, designed to feel natural and blend seamlessly with the vanilla environment.

🌿 **Features:**
- **Custom Leaves** – decorative and functional, behaving like vanilla foliage.
- **Bush Saplings** – plant them and watch new bushes grow.
- **World Generation** – bushes naturally spawn across the world, adding more variety to exploration and landscapes.

Perfect for players who enjoy a more detailed and immersive natural environment.

This mod created for project **NewBeta**.
